Usage:
  circleci repo <command> [flags]
  circleci repo [command]

Available Commands:
  scan        Detect the language stack and setup commands for this repo

Global Flags:
  -c, --config string   path to config file (default: ~/.config/circleci/config.yml)
      --debug           enable debug logging
  -q, --quiet           suppress informational output; data on stdout is unaffected

Use "circleci repo [command] --help" for more information about a command.
